title: 360 Recruitment Consultant (Freelance)
description:
360 Recruitment Consultant (Freelance)

Location: Singapore (Hybrid – Bi-weekly collaborative sessions in-office)
Remuneration: 100% Commission-Based (Uncapped, $1,000+ per placement)

About GYK TalenSync Pte. Ltd.

GYK TalenSync is a Singapore-based recruitment and talent solutions firm. We specialize in connecting high-growth businesses with top-tier talent. We are looking for entrepreneurial-minded Freelance 360 Recruiters to join our network and drive business growth.

The Role (360-Degree Desk)

In this 360-degree freelance role, you will manage the full recruitment lifecycle—from identifying new business opportunities to successfully placing candidates. This is a high-autonomy role that comprises of Sales (Hunter) and the precision of talent matching (Sourcing).

Key Responsibilities:-

  • Business Development: Actively identify and acquire new client companies (B2B) in need of recruitment services.

  • Account Management: Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with hiring managers to understand their organizational needs.

  • Candidate Sourcing & Screening: Source, interview, and shortlist high-quality candidates across various platforms and networks.

  • End-to-End Execution: Facilitate the entire process, including interview coordination, salary negotiation, and post-placement follow-ups.

  • Market Analysis: Stay updated on industry trends in Singapore to provide consultative advice to both clients and candidates.

Skills Requirements:-

  • Experience: Proven track record in 360 recruitment, business development, or B2B sales.

  • Communication: Professional fluency in business communications (written and spoken) to effectively consult with corporate clients and candidates.

  • Mindset: Self-motivated, resilient, and able to work independently towards performance targets.

  • Networking: Strong networking skills with access to professional platforms or industry-specific talent pools.

What’s in it for You?

  • Uncapped Commissions: Performance-driven earnings starting from $1,000 and above per placement. No ceiling on your income.

  • Hybrid Flexibility: Work remotely most of the time, with a bi-weekly scheduled return to the office for team alignment, strategy sharing, and synergy.

  • Operational Support: Leverage the GYK TalenSync brand name, existing frameworks, Job portals, and a collaborative team environment.

  • Account Ownership: Manage your own "Clients within a business" with the freedom to choose your niche and work style.

GYK TalenSync is an equal opportunity partner. We evaluate all applicants based on merit, skills, and experience, regardless of age, race, gender, religion, marital status, family responsibilities, or disability.

Note on Remuneration: This is a freelance, commission-only engagement. Remuneration is strictly per successful placement. The range of $1,000+ is an estimate based on standard placement fees; total earnings are dependent on the number and value of successful hires managed by the consultant.

How to Apply: Submit your updated resume in MS Word format by clicking the QUICK APPLY button.

Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection and use of your personal data by GYK TalenSync Pte Ltd for recruitment purposes in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

postedCompany.description:
Established with a passion for nurturing organizational growth and personal growth, we bring a wealth of experience in HR Consulting, Talent management, and Organizational Development.


We have a strong passion for people and are dedicated to connect organizations with the right talent at the right time.


Our mission is to empower businesses to build high-performing teams by delivering innovative, ethical, and personalized HR and talent solutions. At GYK Talensync, we are committed to shaping the future of work by creating workplaces that inspire, grow, and thrive.


GYK Talensync offers a range of services designed to meet the diverse needs of modern businesses:

  • Talent Acquisition and Management: Attract, hire, and retain top talent with our comprehensive talent solutions.
  • Employee Engagement: Enhance employee satisfaction, productivity, and retention through targeted engagement strategies.
  • HR Compliance and Risk Management: Mitigate risks and ensure compliance through HR Audits and improvements
  • HR Operations:  Providing solutions to your HR operations requirements including payroll, HRMS implementation and review

EA License Number: 23C1806
